title: Princess Lily and the Magic Library
synopsis: When Lily discovers that fairy tale characters have escaped from the school library books, she must help them find their way back home before story time ends.

pages.text: Lily loved library time at school. She walked between the tall shelves of books. Today felt different. Something was sparkling near the fairy tale section.

illustration.description: A young girl with curly dark hair and bright brown eyes walking through a colorful school library. Golden sparkles float around the fairy tale book section. The library has rainbow-colored shelves and cozy reading nooks with diverse children in the background reading.
illustration.alt: Lily exploring the magical school library

pages.text: "Oh my!" said Lily. A tiny fairy sat on top of a book. The fairy had purple wings and looked very worried. "I can't find my way back into my story," said the fairy.

illustration.description: A small fairy with shimmering purple wings and a green dress sitting on an open fairy tale book. The fairy looks concerned with big expressive eyes. Lily kneels down to see the fairy better, her face showing wonder and curiosity.
illustration.alt: Lily meeting the worried fairy on the book

pages.text: Lily looked around. More fairy tale characters were everywhere! A small dragon was playing with blocks. Three bears were eating snacks at a table. "They all escaped!" Lily whispered.

illustration.description: A whimsical library scene showing various fairy tale characters scattered around. A friendly purple dragon plays with colorful alphabet blocks, three diverse teddy bears sit at a small table eating crackers, and other magical creatures explore the library space.
illustration.alt: Fairy tale characters loose in the library

pages.text: "Don't worry," said Lily. "I will help you get home." She picked up the fairy gently. "What story are you from?" "The Flower Garden Tale," said the fairy. "But I forgot which book!"

illustration.description: Lily carefully holding the tiny purple fairy in her cupped hands. Both characters have kind expressions. The fairy points toward a shelf of colorful fairy tale books. Warm golden light surrounds them, creating a magical atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Lily promising to help the lost fairy

pages.text: Lily found the right book. She opened it carefully. "Look! There's your flower garden!" The fairy clapped her tiny hands. "Thank you, Princess Lily!" She flew right into the book.

illustration.description: An open book showing a beautiful illustrated flower garden with vibrant colors. The fairy flies toward the book pages with joy, her wings sparkling. Lily smiles proudly as she holds the book, surrounded by magical golden sparkles.
illustration.alt: The fairy flying back into her storybook

pages.text: Next, Lily helped the dragon find his castle book. Then she helped the three bears find their cottage story. "You're so helpful!" said Papa Bear. Lily felt very proud.

illustration.description: Lily surrounded by grateful fairy tale characters. The dragon waves goodbye as he enters a castle book, while the three bears group hug near their cottage storybook. All characters have happy, thankful expressions with warm colors throughout the scene.
illustration.alt: All the fairy tale characters thanking Lily

pages.text: Ms. Rodriguez, the librarian, walked over. "Lily, you've been so quiet. Are you having a good time?" Lily looked at the books. All the characters were back in their stories.

illustration.description: A kind librarian with glasses and wavy black hair approaches Lily. Ms. Rodriguez wears a colorful cardigan and has a warm smile. Lily looks up with a mysterious smile, holding several fairy tale books that now look normal and peaceful.
illustration.alt: Ms. Rodriguez talking to Lily in the library

pages.text: "Yes, Ms. Rodriguez. I made new friends today." Lily smiled at the fairy tale books. She could see the fairy waving from inside her story. The dragon winked at her too.

illustration.description: Lily holding open fairy tale books where tiny magical characters can be seen waving from within the illustrated pages. The fairy waves from her flower garden page, and the dragon winks from his castle page. The scene has a secretive, magical feeling.
illustration.alt: Lily seeing her magical friends in their books

pages.text: "Would you like to be my library helper?" asked Ms. Rodriguez. "You seem to have a special way with books." Lily hugged the books tight. "Yes! I love helping stories stay just right."

illustration.description: Lily beaming with joy as she hugs a stack of colorful fairy tale books to her chest. Ms. Rodriguez smiles warmly in the background. The library around them glows with soft, magical light, and tiny sparkles float in the air, suggesting the magic is still present.
illustration.alt: Lily accepting her role as library helper

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What did Lily discover in the library?
choices: Fairy tale characters had escaped from books
questions.explanation: Lily found fairy tale characters like a fairy, dragon, and three bears who had escaped from their storybooks.

questions.question: What story was the fairy from?
questions.explanation: The purple fairy told Lily she was from 'The Flower Garden Tale' but couldn't remember which book.

questions.question: Who is the school librarian?
questions.explanation: Ms. Rodriguez is the kind librarian who asked Lily to be her library helper.

questions.question: How did Lily help the fairy tale characters?
choices: She helped them find their correct storybooks
questions.explanation: Lily helped each character find their way back into their correct storybooks where they belonged.

questions.question: What special job did Lily get at the end?
questions.explanation: Ms. Rodriguez asked Lily to be her library helper because she had a special way with books.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.instructions: Fill in the missing words to complete the sentences from the story.

sentences.text: The fairy had _____ wings and looked worried.
_____ helped all the characters find their books.

pages.title: Match the Characters
pages.instructions: Match each character to their story home.

sentences.text: The _____ lived in a flower garden.
The three _____ belonged in a cottage story.
The _____ went back to his castle book.
